description_long: This is a tall, freestanding shelving unit with four open shelves and a prominent display header at the top, which features illuminated signage with a blue glow and visible branding. The frame is constructed from dark, likely metal material, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The shelves are evenly spaced and appear to be made of the same material as the frame, providing ample space for displaying products or books. The base is a wide, flat platform, likely designed for stability and to prevent tipping, and it sits on a light-colored rectangular mat or platform. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban environments such as retail stores, public spaces, or transit stations. The illuminated header makes it ideal for attracting attention in busy urban settings.
description: A tall, freestanding black shelving unit with four open shelves and an illuminated branded header, set on a wide base for stability. Its modern, industrial design is ideal for urban retail or public display.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves, a wide base, and a prominent illuminated header with branding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the vertical frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the shelves and the solid structure of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and open sides of the shelving unit.
